overall.description: A nighttime driving sequence from a video game (GTA V) showing a vehicle exiting a tunnel onto a highway, navigating through urban streets, and stopping at a traffic light. The footage features high-quality rendered graphics with artificial street lighting and modern city architecture.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through an enclosed tunnel with distinctive orange-yellow walls and fluorescent overhead lighting. The camera follows a red sports car ahead while passing concrete support pillars and parked vehicles along the left wall, approaching the tunnel exit visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into the open night air, transitioning to a multi-lane highway lined with street lights and passing under multiple concrete overpasses. The road curves along a hillside with a retaining wall on the right, while the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic including a white sedan and gray sedan.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a curved urban street with a prominent modern glass building on the right side, passing palm trees and approaching an intersection. The vehicle slows down and makes a right turn at the stop sign, crossing a pedestrian crosswalk while a white sports car waits at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic lights and downtown skyline view

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop at a red traffic light behind a gray sedan

segments.scene_description: After turning, the vehicle drives along a city street with the downtown skyline visible in the distance, passing park benches and palm trees. The vehicle approaches an intersection and comes to a stop behind a gray sedan at a red traffic light, with crosswalk markings visible on the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed confines of a tunnel into the expansive, neon-lit environment of a modern city at night. It begins within a tunnel characterized by orange-yellow walls and fluorescent overhead lighting, following a red sports car past concrete pillars toward a distant exit. As the vehicle emerges into the open air, the scene shifts to a multi-lane highway where the camera glides under concrete overpasses and along a hillside retaining wall amidst moderate traffic. The movement then transitions from the highway to a curved urban street lined with palm trees and a prominent glass building, before the vehicle slows to make a right turn across a pedestrian crosswalk. Finally, the camera proceeds along a city street with the downtown skyline visible in the distance, coming to a complete stop behind a gray sedan at a red traffic light.
